source: Monolith- Real Time Recommendation System With Collisionless Embedding Table

concepts.finding: Real-time training system with collisionless embedding table and streaming training. Embeddings updated in near real-time as new user interactions occur. Two-tower architecture with real-time embedding synchronization.
concepts.implication: Real-world deployment of embedding-based models requires: (1) high-throughput embedding serving, (2) incremental/streaming updates, (3) collision-free embedding tables for reliable training.
concepts.open_question: What infrastructure is needed for production keyword-intent clustering serving? Is batch processing sufficient or is real-time needed?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: An incremental/online clustering system for keywords adapts to distribution shifts in 24h vs batch retraining requiring 7+ days.
